dataset: Bengaluru Places — RAG Model Dataset v2

places.name: Dyu Art Cafe
places.address: 23, KHB MIG Colony, 1st Cross Rd, Koramangala 8th Block, Bengaluru

budget.notes: Coffee ₹120–200, mains ₹250–400. Budget-friendly for a cafe experience.

places.description: A bungalow-style cafe in Koramangala with Kerala-inspired architecture, art gallery walls, open courtyard, and a quiet, serene vibe. Perfect for slow afternoons, solo reading, or a peaceful date.

places.name: Lalbagh Botanical Garden

budget.notes: Entry ₹30 for adults. Snacks inside ₹30–100. Cart ride ₹30–50.

places.description: One of Bangalore's most iconic green spaces with rose gardens, bonsai garden, lotus pond, glass house, and a serene lake. Great for morning jogs, leisurely walks, and picnics.

places.name: Cubbon Park (Sri Chamarajendra Park)

budget.notes: Free entry. Toy train and boating ₹20–50 extra.

places.description: A large, well-maintained urban green space in the heart of Bengaluru, perfect for walking, jogging, cycling, and spending time outdoors. Has dedicated kids' play areas and a boating area.

places.name: Visvesvaraya Industrial & Technological Museum
places.address: 5216, Kasturba Rd, near Chinnaswamy Stadium, Bengaluru

budget.notes: Entry ₹100 adults, ₹35 students. 3D show or special exhibits ~₹50–80 extra.

places.description: A 4-storey science and technology museum with interactive exhibits on physics, space, engineering, and India's industrial heritage. Fun and educational for all ages.

places.name: Jawaharlal Nehru Planetarium
places.address: Sankey Rd, High Grounds, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560001

budget.notes: Science park ₹30. Sky show ₹80–150 by show type. Book on BookMyShow in advance.

places.description: A planetarium with immersive dome shows about stars, planets, galaxies, and India's space achievements. Well-suited for students, curious minds, and families.

places.name: Bengaluru Palace

budget.notes: Entry ₹300 for adults. Free audio guide with valid physical ID. No photography inside.

places.description: A Tudor-style royal palace with ornate wooden interiors, carved details, and a free audio tour covering 20 points of interest.

places.name: Tipu Sultan's Summer Palace
places.address: 42, Tippu Sultan Palace Rd, Chamrajpet, Bengaluru

budget.notes: Entry ₹15 for Indian nationals. Very affordable heritage visit.

places.description: An 18th-century Indo-Islamic palace built by Tipu Sultan with intricate teakwood carvings. Short but historically rich visit near KR Market.

places.name: Bengaluru Fort
places.address: Krishna Rajendra Rd, New Tharagupet, Bengaluru

budget.notes: No entry fee. 20–30 min visit. Best combined with KR Market nearby.

places.description: A quiet remnant of old Bengaluru with stone walls, ancient gateways, and a small temple. No entry fee.

places.name: National Gallery of Modern Art (NGMA)
places.hours: Tue–Fri 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM | Sat–Sun 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM (Closed Monday)

budget.notes: Entry ₹20 for Indian nationals. One of the cheapest premium cultural experiences in Bengaluru.

places.description: A heritage mansion housing modern and contemporary Indian art by Ravi Varma, Amrita Sher-Gil, MF Husain. Has a sculpture garden, cafe, and library.

places.name: Aquarium Paradise
places.address: Jayamahal Main Rd, opposite TV Tower, J.C.Nagar, Bengaluru

budget.notes: Adults ₹499, kids ₹449. Check website and District app for discounts. Plan 2–3 hours.

places.description: A well-maintained private aquarium with exotic marine life, themed tanks, jellyfish section, and a mermaid show at 3 PM.

places.name: Namma Bengaluru Aquarium
places.hours: Mon–Fri 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM | Sat–Sun 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM

budget.notes: Weekday ₹95, weekend ₹118. One of the most affordable aquarium experiences in India.

places.description: India's second-largest public aquarium inside Cubbon Park with 70+ species, a tunnel tank, coral reefs, koi pond, and feeding sessions.

places.name: Snow City Bengaluru
places.address: Fun World Complex, 1st Floor, Jayamahal Main Rd, J.C.Nagar, Bengaluru

budget.notes: 45-min session. Jacket, shoes, gloves provided. Unlimited slot ₹1200 — not recommended, 30 mins in snow is plenty.

places.description: A sub-zero indoor snow experience with slides, igloos, snow play areas, glass bridge, and hot momos inside. Jackets and snow boots provided.

places.name: Eyelusion Bangalore
places.address: Snowcity, Fun World Complex, Jayamahal Main Rd, Bengaluru

budget.notes: Entry ₹500. Finishable in under 1 hour. Best as a couple or with friends for photos.

places.description: An interactive optical illusion and AR art museum where painted walls create 3D photo effects. Mirror maze included.

places.name: Loco Bear - The Ultimate Entertainment Hub

budget.notes: Activities priced individually. Go-kart ~₹300, bowling ~₹250/game, laser tag ~₹250. Budget ₹1000–1500 for a full session.

places.description: A large indoor entertainment hub with go-karting, bowling, laser tag, VR, trampoline zone, arcade games, and shooting range. One-stop fun for groups.

places.name: Dirt Mania Outdoor Adventures

budget.notes: 6 km trail ~₹1000, 12 km trail ~₹1800. Price varies by bike type.

places.description: ATV quad biking on rugged off-road trails with 6 km and 12 km packages. Trained instructors, safety briefing included. Best near sunset.

places.name: escape2explore

budget.notes: Day trips ₹700–₹1200. Weekend treks with stay ₹1500–₹2500. Includes transport, stay, food.

places.description: A trekking and adventure travel company offering treks to Kumar Parvatha, Netravati, Nandi Hills, and Adiyogi day tours. Includes homestay stays, bonfire, and group travel.

places.name: Rocksport Bengaluru
places.address: Kanakapura Main Rd, near Bolare, Bengaluru

budget.notes: Weekend overnight packages with activities, stay, and meals included.

places.description: An outdoor resort near Bengaluru offering tent stays, campfire, rain dance, rope activities, and group games. Budget-friendly for school groups and corporate outings.

places.name: Bannerghatta Nature Camp – Jungle Lodges

budget.notes: Package includes accommodation, safari, all meals, and nature walk. Book via Jungle Lodges & Resorts official website.

places.description: A jungle lodge inside Bannerghatta Biological Park offering safari tours, nature walks, wildlife spotting (lions, tigers, leopards, elephants), bonfire evenings, and wooden cottage stays.

places.name: Bugle Rock Park

budget.notes: Completely free. Located next to the free-to-visit Bull Temple and Dodda Ganapathi Temple.

places.description: A beautiful park around 3,000-million-year-old rock formations in Basavanagudi. Adjacent to the Dodda Ganapathi and Bull Temple. Quiet and perfect for an evening walk.

places.name: Just BLR

budget.notes: Food ₹250–500 per dish. Mocktails ₹200–350. Budget ₹800–1000 for a full evening.

places.description: A popular bar and grill on Brigade Road with live music, vibrant atmosphere, and a wide menu. Great for evenings out with friends or a casual date night.

places.name: The 13th Floor

budget.notes: Cocktails ₹400–600, mains ₹350–600. Budget ₹1200–1500 for food + drinks. No cover charge.

places.description: A rooftop bar on MG Road with stunning panoramic city views, especially at sunset. Great cocktails, good food, vibrant music.

places.name: Olive Beach
places.hours: 12:00 PM – 3:45 PM | 7:00 PM – 12:00 AM (extended on weekends)

budget.notes: Mains ₹600–1200, starters ₹400–800. Advance booking recommended for patio seating.

places.description: An upscale Mediterranean restaurant with indoor and patio seating, serene ambience, and fine food. Best for romantic dinners.

places.name: Farmlore
places.address: Survey No:67, Sathnur Village, Bagalur, Bengaluru

budget.notes: 5-course ~₹5000, 10-course degustation ~₹8000 per person. Reservation mandatory.

places.description: One of Bengaluru's top fine dining restaurants offering 5–10 course degustation menus on a farm on the city's outskirts. Creative seasonal menus and exceptional service.

places.name: The Hole In The Wall Cafe

budget.notes: English breakfast ₹350–500. Coffee ₹150–200. Generous portions, great value for the quality.

places.description: An iconic Bangalore cafe known for English breakfasts, cozy bookshelves, and memorabilia-filled interiors. Best for slow mornings.

places.name: Vels Jollywood Studios and Adventure

budget.notes: All-inclusive ticket covers most rides and 5D movie. Check website for combos and offers.

places.description: A themed amusement park near Bengaluru with dinosaur park, water rides, 5D movie, Titanic replica, glow garden, and mirror maze. Ideal for families.

places.name: CURIOUSCITY Science Center

budget.notes: Weekend-only. Book online in advance. Ideal for ages 8+.

places.description: A hands-on science center open only on weekends with themed rooms on physics, plasma balls, Tesla coils, and escape rooms. Best for school-age children (8+).

places.name: Jaya Prakash Narayana (JP) Park
places.hours: 5:00 AM – 9:00 PM (all days, 8 PM on Sundays)

budget.notes: Free entry. Toy train and activities inside ₹20–50 extra.

places.description: One of Bengaluru's largest parks with a lake, musical fountain, swimming pool, toy train, gym equipment, and kids' play area.

places.name: M.N. Krishna Rao Park
places.address: Dewan Madhava Rao Rd, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru

budget.notes: Completely free. Healthy street food right outside ₹50–150.

places.description: A densely tree-lined park in Basavanagudi with running tracks, badminton and basketball courts, kids play area, and open gym.

places.name: Trippy Goat Cafe
places.address: MG Road, opposite East Parade Church, Ashok Nagar, Bengaluru
places.hours: Mon–Fri 10:30 AM – 11:30 PM | Sat–Sun 9:00 AM – 11:30 PM

budget.notes: Lamb chops ~₹600, bone marrow ~₹700. Cocktails ₹400–600. Premium pricing for creative dishes.

places.description: A chic cafe on MG Road with outdoor seating and a creative menu including lamb chops, bone marrow, and cocktails. Pet-friendly.

places.name: Wonderla Amusement Park
places.hours: Mon–Fri 11:00 AM – 6:00 PM | Sat–Sun 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM

budget.notes: Regular ticket ₹900–1200. Fast Track ₹1400–1800. Book on BookMyShow for discounts. Food inside ₹200–400 extra. Fast Track highly recommended on weekends.

places.description: Bengaluru's most popular amusement and water park on Mysore Road with 60+ land and water rides. Standout rides: Recoil and Mission Interstellar. A full day is needed to cover everything. 30 km from the city.
highlights: 30 km from city on Mysore Road

places.name: Fun World Amusement Park
places.address: Palace Grounds, Jayamahal Main Rd, J.C.Nagar, Bengaluru

budget.notes: Cheaper and less crowded than Wonderla. Combo tickets for dry rides + water park available. Inside the city.

places.description: A city-based amusement and water park inside Palace Grounds, JC Nagar. Affordable, less crowded, and close to Snow City and Aquarium Paradise in the same complex.

places.name: Phoenix Marketcity

budget.notes: Free entry. Food court ₹200–400. PVR movies ₹200–350. Shopping is as much as you want to spend.

places.description: One of Bengaluru's largest premium malls in Whitefield with 200+ brands, PVR cinema, diverse food court, Kids' Looft play zone, and seasonal events. A full-day shopping and entertainment destination.

places.name: UB City
places.address: 24, Vittal Mallya Rd, Ashok Nagar, Bengaluru

budget.notes: India's first luxury mall. Brands like LV, Gucci, Apple. Dining at Toscano or High Ultra Lounge ₹2000–4000 per person. Just walking around is free and great for photos.

places.description: India's first luxury mall with Italian Renaissance architecture, luxury brand boutiques (Louis Vuitton, Gucci, Apple), fine dining, a rooftop lounge, art gallery, and serene walkways. Bengaluru's most upscale social destination.

places.name: Orion Mall

budget.notes: Free entry. Food court ₹200–400. PVR & 4D theatre ₹200–350. Boating outside ₹100. Metro-accessible.

places.description: One of Bengaluru's most-visited malls in Rajajinagar with a lake-view exterior, boating, diverse food court, PVR multiplex, Timezone gaming zone, and 4D theatre. Metro accessible.

places.name: Nexus Mall Koramangala (Forum Mall)

budget.notes: Free entry. Meals ₹200–500. PVR INOX is one of the best screens in Koramangala.

places.description: A beloved Bengaluru landmark in Koramangala (originally Forum Mall) with major brands, one of the city's best PVR INOX screens, diverse food options, and frequent pop-up local/handloom stalls.

places.name: VR Bengaluru

budget.notes: Free entry. PVR IMAX ₹300–450. Stores: H&M, Zudio, LuLu Hypermarket. Less crowded than adjacent Phoenix Marketcity.

places.description: A spacious and relatively quiet mall next to Phoenix Marketcity in Whitefield with PVR IMAX, H&M, Zudio, LuLu Hypermarket, Cult.fit, and an adventure climbing zone.

places.name: Elements Mall

budget.notes: Free entry. Smaller, quieter mall. Good food court. PVR available. Best for north Bengaluru near Manyata Tech Park.

places.description: A calm, less-crowded mall near Manyata Tech Park in north Bengaluru with a good food court, PVR cinema, and supermarket. Best for a quick easy outing without the rush of bigger malls.
